title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: October 3, 2024
summary: October 3, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a greater rate of 7.48% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 4.37%), from the level on 09/26/2024 of 4.480 M km 2 to 4.842 M km 2 for this week. title: AOOS announces new board members
summary: We are very pleased to announce the designation of new AOOS Board members! Rudy Tsukada from North Pacific Fishery Management Council will replace the late Kenny Down.
